name: Hulmes Transportation Svc LTD
registry_source: BBB Business Profile (mirroring MA SOC filing); MA Secretary of the Commonwealth, Corporations Division (https://corp.sec.state.ma.us/corpweb/CorpSearch/CorpSearch.aspx)
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA carrier record located under HULMES, HULMES TRANSPORTATION, HULMES TRANS, or HULMES TRANSPORTATION SERVICES via SAFER keyword search. Company operates senior/ADA paratransit and special-needs school transportation in western MA since 1977 (per company site); BBB lists LLC formation 1/1/1987, owner Paul Anzianno, ~190 employees, est. revenue ~$11.4M. Likely operates intrastate only without USDOT registration, or is registered under a different legal name (e.g., affiliated entity). Suggest manual SOC search and direct call to confirm USDOT. inc_date reflects BBB-reported business start; founding year per company is 1977.

name: Logan Bus Co Inc

name: Northstar Bus Lines LLC
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State (file 823095300021); mirror via city-data.com
notes: FMCSA legal name NORTHSTAR BUS LINES LLC, DBA AMERICAN STUDENT TRANSPORTATION. Address matches exactly. Safety rating Satisfactory dated 1/31/2023. Family-owned per company history (since 1963 as operator brand, but current LLC entity dates to 2015).

name: Voigt's Bus
fmcsa_address: 24243 Co Rd 7, Saint Augusta, MN 56301 (mail: PO Box 1, Saint Cloud, MN 56302)
registry_source: MN Secretary of State Business Search (https://mblsportal.sos.mn.gov/Business/Search); company history; BBB profile
notes: Carrier match is to VOIGT'S SCHOOL BUS SERVICES INC (USDOT 881425) which is the FMCSA-registered school-bus operating entity for Voigt's Bus Companies; the input address 1240 Osborne Rd NE, Minneapolis (Fridley) is one of four Voigt's facilities (others: Cold Spring, St. Augusta, St. Cloud) — FMCSA physical address is the St. Augusta location. Fleet of 20 power units in SAFER appears to reflect the school-bus subsidiary only; company-wide fleet is 100+ buses across affiliates including Voigt's Bus Service Inc, Voigt's School Bus Services Inc, and Voigt's Motorcoach Travel. inc_date 1947 per company history (BBB business-start 1/1/1947, founders Norbert and Mercedes Voigt). Confirm MN SOS file # manually as SOS portal not direct-fetchable.

name: Marschall Line
fmcsa_address: 5119 212th Street West, Farmington, MN 55024 (mail: 101 East 10th Street Suite #300, Hastings, MN 55033)
registry_source: MN Secretary of State (entity ID 2A-24, MN Stat. 302A Business Corporation, Domestic); mirror via city-data.com
notes: FMCSA legal name MARSCHALL LINE LLC at the Farmington address; mailing address ties to parent Minnesota Coaches in Hastings. Safety rating Satisfactory dated 11/17/2015. Vehicle OOS rate 30.8% exceeds national average (22.26%). MN SOS shows Marschall Line, Inc. entity ID 2A-24 originally filed 9/2/1971 as Domestic Business Corp, Active/Good Standing; SAFER carrier is the LLC affiliate (likely operating company under the corporation parent). Company operating since 1948 per history (predates current SOS filing). Part of Minnesota Coaches family; January 2025 STB notice covers acquisition of control by TIP Minnesota Coaches Acquisition LLC / Tiger Infrastructure Partners.
